ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schemas" (
  "schema_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schema */,
  "schema_name" TEXT /* Name of the schema */,
  "display_label" TEXT /* Label displayed for the schema */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schema and its purpose */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of schema (e.g., static, dynamic) */,
  "modifier" INTEGER /* Modifier indicating schema changes or version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the schema */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the schema was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the schema */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the schema was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the schema (e.g., active, archived, draft) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the schema */,
  "is_dynamic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the schema is dynamic */,
  "custom_metadata" TEXT /* Custom metadata associated with the schema */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schema_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "schema_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the schema the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "display_label" TEXT /* Label displayed for the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property and its use */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the property */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the property */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the property */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was last modified */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is visible in the user interface */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property can be edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_schema_id FOREIGN KEY ("schema_id") REFERENCES schemas ("schema_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "source_schema_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source schema */,
  "target_schema_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target schema */,
  "relationship_strength" REAL /* Strength of the relationship (value indicating how strong the relation is) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the relationship (e.g., one-way, two-way) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the relationship */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last modified */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., association, aggregation, composition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_target_schema_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_schema_id") REFERENCES schemas ("schema_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_source_schema_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_schema_id") REFERENCES schemas ("schema_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_attributes" (
  "custom_attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom attribute */,
  "schema_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schema associated with the custom attribute */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the custom attribute (if applicable) */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom attribute */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the custom attribute */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the custom attribute */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the custom attribute was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the custom attribute */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the custom attribute was last modified */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the custom attribute is required */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the custom attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custom_attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_attributes_schema_id FOREIGN KEY ("schema_id") REFERENCES schemas ("schema_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_attributes_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "schema_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schema associated with the log entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the log entry (if applicable) */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_logs_schema_id FOREIGN KEY ("schema_id") REFERENCES schemas ("schema_id")
)
